commands.repair_reason: Human handling remains because the contributor must supply real behavior proof from a real setup; source review did not find a narrow code defect for ClawSweeper to repair.; Cleared: The diff tightens server-side package publish authorization and adds tests/docs/changelog without adding dependency, workflow, secret, or supply-chain surface. (sha=64bf59c98c4242185090f2dfaf28380649b301b9)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds final insert active-state checks for package publish actor, owner, and owner publisher, plus regression tests, a changelog entry, and a security-moderation spec note.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows a high-confidence path: current main validates publish authority, spends time parsing/scanning/hashing, then `insertReleaseInternal` only rejects missing principals before inserting the release.
commands.review_followup: Human handling remains because the contributor must supply real behavior proof from a real setup; source review did not find a narrow code defect for ClawSweeper to repair.

target.title: fix: revalidate package publish owners before insert
target.body:
## Summary

Revalidates package publish authority immediately before inserting a package release.

## What changed

- Final release insert rechecks actor state.
- Final release insert rechecks owner user state.
- Final release insert rechecks owner publisher active state.
- A publish that started while valid cannot complete if the actor/owner/publisher is banned, deleted, or deactivated before the final write.

## Behavior proof

The package publish regression suite now covers the late-write window:

- Publish is rejected when the actor becomes invalid before insert.
- Publish is rejected when the package owner becomes invalid before insert.
- Publish is rejected when the owner publisher becomes inactive before insert.

The expected public behavior is an explicit publish rejection, not a release row inserted under stale authority.

## Validation

```text
$ bun run test convex/packages.public.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       132 passed (132)
```

```text
$ bun run ci:static
passed
```

```text
$ bun run ci:unit
Test Files  204 passed (204)
Tests       1988 passed (1988)
Statements  85.98%
Branches    75.17%
Functions   86.37%
Lines        89.48%
```

```text
$ bun run ci:types-build
tsc, package typechecks, clawhub-mod typecheck, Vite build, and Nitro build passed.
```

## External blocker

The known Vercel preview failure is team authorization required for deployment. That is maintainer-owned and not a patch failure.

AI-assisted: yes. I reviewed the diff, can maintain it, and validated it with the commands above.
target.author: vyctorbrzezowski
